message:
test(moderation): add unit tests for content filter and spam checker

15 tests covering: URL detection (single/multiple/many), uppercase ratio
with length threshold, repeated character detection, spam term matching
(case-insensitive), whitespace normalization, spam classification
thresholds (clean/borderline/spam), confidence capping, and reason
reporting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
